name: frontend-webpack-template
description: Reusable Webpack + Biome + Jest + Babel starter template for frontend projects

scripts.deploy: git checkout gh-pages || git checkout -b gh-pages && git merge main --no-edit && npm run build && git add -f dist && git commit -m 'Deploy to gh-pages' && git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages && git checkout main && rm -rf dist
scripts.reset: git push origin --delete gh-pages && git branch -D gh-pages

author: Aayush
